description: Configure vendor pricing and execute a strategic purchase for 'Precision Ball Bearing - 6205-2RS' based on the requirements in /home/ga/Desktop/purchasing_requirements.txt. Update the product with quotes from Allied Industrial Supply Co. and Pacific Bearing Solutions, then create and confirm a purchase order for 500 units from the most cost-effective supplier. Login credentials: admin@example.com / admin (Database: odoo_demo).
